degree: Bachelor of Science in Information Technology (BSIT)
grade_requirement_in_department: C or better in each course
electives_note: Complete two CSC Elective Courses - Recommended IT Architecture (6 units); Additional electives as needed to reach 120 total units.

lower_division.title: Introduction to Computer Science and Programming I
Introduction to Computer Science and Programming II
System Programming in C and Unix
Introduction to Operating Systems and Networks
Any Physical Science with Lab and/or any Life Science with lab

electives.note: Complete two CSC Elective Courses - Recommended IT Architecture

graduation_policies: A minimum of 40 units, including those required for the major, must be upper division.
A minimum of 18 upper division units in the major must be taken in residence at CSU Dominguez Hills.
Earn an overall grade point average of 2.0 or better in courses taken outside of the department.
Earn a grade of “C” or better in each course taken within the department.
Students must take capstone course ITC 492 Senior Design at CSUDH.
prerequisites: Not explicitly listed in this section; see catalog for course-specific prerequisites.
